questions.subject: IOQM
questions.q:
If $a, b, c$ are real numbers and
$(a+b-5)^2+(b+2 c+3)^2+(c+3 a-10)^2=0$
find the integer nearest to $a^3+b^3+c^3$.
questions.solution:
This is possible only when
$\begin{aligned}
& a+b-5=0 ...(i)\\
& b+2 c+3=0 ...(ii)\\
& c+3 a-10=0 ...(iii)
\end{aligned}$

On solving, we get
$\begin{aligned}
& a=4, b=1, c=-2 \\
& a^3+b^3+c^3=57
\end{aligned}$
